MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and for Entry of Consent Judgment as to Coilhose Pneumatics, Inc. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, no opposition filed, and settlement complies with Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4).
